title: [Cobblemon] Seavls Bizarremons
description: A addon that adds strange fakemon to Cobblemon.
body:
This add-on adds 20+ custom fakemon to your cobblemon world. Those fakemon mostly evolves from 2nd stage pokemon and are desgin and animated by me. ### Installation **Requires [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)** Download and place them in to the resourcepack folder and into your world's datapack folder. List of Fakemon Introduce -----
1.1.0V (Cobblemon 1.6.1)
  • Espilevi [Psychic, Water] - Evolve Espeon by right clicking it with a netherite.
  • Drimid [Psychic, Dragon] - Found very rarely on frozen ocean(can be fished).
  • Dralily [Psychic, Dragon] - Found very rarely on frozen ocean(can be fished), or evolve Drimid at level 50.
  • Dragash [Psychic, Dragon] - Found very rarely on frozen ocean(can be fished), or evolve Dralily at level 60.
  • Qwilton [Water, Poison] - Evolve Qwilfish by level up to 36, or found uncommonly the same as Qwilfish with the addition of coast.
  • Golbur [Ground, Ice] - Found rarely in glacial(ice_spike) biome.
  • Hyburst [Ground, Ice] - Found rarely in glacial(ice_spike) biome or evolve Golbur at level 43.
  • Varoom (nether form) [Steel, Fire] - Found uncommonly in bastion remnant/nether fortress.
  • Revavroom (nether form) [Steel, Fire] - Found uncommonly in bastion remnant/nether fortress or evolve nether Varoom at level 40.
  • Tandemaus (seavlian form) [Normal] - Found rarely in ocean, more likely in frozen ocean.
  • Maushold (seavlian form) [Normal, Steel] - Found rarely in ocean, more likely in frozen ocean or evolve seavlian Tandemaus at level 35 while holding a metal_coat.
  • Regihydro [Water] - Only acess from commands, for future legendaries.
  • Regimoss [Grass] - Only acess from commands, for future legendaries.
  • Leafipotent [Grass] - Only acess from commands, for future mythical.

    • Changes in Typing

  • Tinkaton line (nether form) [Fairy, Fire]
  • Glacida [Ice, Steel]
    • 1.0.0V (Cobblemon 1.5.2)
  • Eevee (alolan form) [Normal, Grass] - Found rarely in beach and jungle biome. Note: alolan form only evolves to alolan Leafeon using a leaf stone.
  • Vaporila [Water, Steel] - Evolve Vaporeon by right clicking it with a netherite.
  • Joltinum [Electric, Steel] - Evolve Jolteon by right clicking it with a netherite.
  • Flarichi [Fire, Steel] - Evolve Flareon by right clicking it with a netherite.
  • Kringwar [Water] - Evolve Kingler at level 45.
  • Umbravis [Dark, Fighting] - Evolve Umbreon by right clicking it with a netherite.
  • Megwar [Water, Dark] - Evolve Sharpedo by right clicking it with a netherite.
  • Clockage [Steel] - Found commonly next to bells or rarely in deserts.
  • Minadial [Steel, Fire] - Found commonly next to bells or rarely in deserts or evolve Clockage at level 20.
  • Mechabang [Steel, Fire] - Evolve Minadial at level 45.
  • Glacida [Ice, Ground] - Evolve Glaceon by right clicking it with a never_melt_ice while in a ice_spike biome.
  • Leaforest [Grass] -
  • (Cherry Blossom form) - Evolve alolan Leafeon by right clicking it with a cherry_sapling while in a cherry_grove biome if female.
  • (Spruce form) - Evolve alolan Leafeon by right clicking it with a spruce_saplin while in a taiga biome if male.
  • Spiritempest [Ghost, Dark] - Evolve Spiritomb by right clicking it with a eye_of_ender while in a soul_sand_valley biome.
  • Motarb [Steel, Rock] - Evolve Crustle by right clicking it with a copper_block.
  • Krokellang [Steel, Flying] - Evolve Klang by level up to 49 while holding a metal_coat.
  • Sylvijou [Fairy, Steel] - Evolve Sylveon by right clicking it with a netherite.
  • Scarablet [Dark, Poison] - Found rarely where kanto Diglets and Dugtrio spawn.
  • Mimivee [ghost, fairy] - Founded the same as Mimikyu.
  • Tinkatink (nether form) [Fairy, Steel] - Found commonly next to gold_block in the bastion remnant.
  • Tinkatuff (nether form) [Fairy, Steel] - Found commonly next to gold_block in bastion remnant/nether fortress or evolve nether Tinkatink at level 24.
  • Tinkaton (nether form) [Fairy, Steel] - Found commonly next to gold_block in bastion remnant/nether fortress or evolve nether Tinkatuff at level 38.
  • Vaporipotent [Water] - Only acess from commands, for future mythical.
    • ---------
